records.question: Which public university nicknamed the Fightin' Blue Hens has an enrollment of exactly 19067 and basketball records with an acc_home of 6–2, acc_percent of .875, and all_road of 13–0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.acc_home = '6–2' AND university.enrollment = 19067.0 AND basketball_match.acc_percent = '.875' AND basketball_match.all_road = '13–0' AND university.affiliation = 'Public' AND university.nickname = 'Fightin'' Blue Hens'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.School_ID
FROM university u
JOIN basketball_match b ON u.School_ID = b.School_ID
WHERE u.Nickname = "Fightin' Blue Hens"
AND u.Enrollment = 19067
AND b.ACC_Home = "6–2"
AND b.ACC_Percent = ".875"
AND b.All_Road = "13–0"

records.question: Which universities are Stony Brook University, called Seawolves, affiliated as Public, founded in 1957 or later, with enrollment at most 23997, and competing in the America East Conference ( D-I )?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
WHERE university.primary_conference = 'America East Conference ( D-I )' AND university.nickname = 'Seawolves' AND university.school = 'Stony Brook University' AND university.founded >= 1957.0 AND university.enrollment <= 23997.0 AND university.affiliation = 'Public'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT university.School_ID
FROM university
WHERE university.School = 'Stony Brook University'
AND university.Nickname = 'Seawolves'
AND university.Affiliation = 'Public'
AND university.Founded >= 1957
AND university.Enrollment <= 23997
AND university.Primary_conference = 'America East Conference ( D-I )'

records.question: Which universities have basketball matches where the team name is North Carolina?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.team_name = 'North Carolina'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.School_ID
FROM university u
INNER JOIN basketball_match bm ON u.School_ID = bm.School_ID
WHERE bm.Team_Name = 'North Carolina'

records.question: Which public universities in Stony Brook have the nickname Seawolves, were founded in 1957 or later, have an enrollment of at least 23997, and compete in the America East Conference ( D-I ) as their primary conference?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
WHERE university.location LIKE '%Stony Brook%' AND university.founded >= 1957.0 AND university.primary_conference = 'America East Conference ( D-I )' AND university.affiliation = 'Public' AND university.nickname = 'Seawolves' AND university.enrollment >= 23997.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.School_ID
FROM university u
WHERE u.Location = 'Stony Brook'
AND u.Nickname = 'Seawolves'
AND u.Founded >= 1957
AND u.Enrollment >= 23997
AND u.Primary_conference = 'America East Conference ( D-I )'
